Resolves #12251

Authored by Claude Opus 4.8 (Claude Code). Session d2fbe3b2-44c4-4aab-b8c7-62621babc790.
FAIR-band: over-target — operator-directed lane (operator explicitly assigned me this README PR, 2026-05-31); author-lane self-selection yields to direct operator direction.

Refines the README's *presentation* after the apex content landed (#12228 / PR #12243). Operator-flagged 2026-05-31; grounded in the current `dev` README + the graduated apex hero (Discussion #12234), not memory. Every operator correction this session is reflected in the diff below.

Evidence: L1 (static doc — hygiene clean, all relative links resolve incl. the v13 cloud-deployment doc-links, motto + MX-block preserved verbatim, all gated-RSI instances reframed, zero framework comparisons, zero client-name leak) → L1 required (docs-presentation ACs, no runtime surface). No residual — the maturity section is completed in `bbb1b3022` (not deferred).

## Deltas
- **Apex featured (opening).** Replaced the condensed paraphrase with the full graduated #12234 hero, broken into three readable paragraphs — swarm + Active Hybrid GraphRAG; the Neural Link possession interface + autonomous lifecycle + self-healing loops; the *"706 merged PRs / 800 closed issues … maintains its own codebase today; being built to inhabit yours"* proof-close. Featured, not a wall of text.
- **gated-RSI reframed (×3, for consistency).** *"agents propose, humans approve at merge"* → founder-architect **governance choice** (*"the swarm runs the engineering lifecycle; the founder-architect holds final merge authority as a governance choice"*) in the opening MX block, the Brain-section IDE line, and Contributing. Per Discussion #12234 `dc-17119184` + ADR 0018 §2.7 OD-1 — the same correction that landed in VISION §5 (PR #12246).
- **"This is the headline" fixed.** The confusing Brain-bullet phrasing → *"the self-evolving engineering institution that builds, reviews, and maintains the Body in public"*; the parallel Body-bullet *"adoption substrate"* → *"the runtime the Brain inhabits, improves, and ships to production"*.
- **"Platform at Scale" trimmed.** ~50-line per-directory number breakdown → a concise scale summary + the Codebase Overview link. Cuts the excessive bragging; keeps a representative scale signal.
- **Framework comparisons removed (`9c2a2da11`).** Dropped the framework-negation anti-pattern in three spots (*"an organism rather than a framework"*, *"not a framework-shopping option"*, the *"React with a different syntax"/Astro/Next.js* audience-foil). Negation still plants the category-frame `§neo_identity_anchor` says Neo transcends; rewrote each positively. `grep framework|React|Angular|Vue` → 0.
- **"Neo.mjs" branding consistency (`9c2a2da11`).** Bare "Neo" → "Neo.mjs" where it carries the brand, for SEO/crawler disambiguation.
- **Maturity section completed (`bbb1b3022`) — was the prior blocker, now done.** Dropped the stale v12.1.0-era faculty-staging table (≈1300 merged PRs behind `dev`) and replaced it with the verified **"The Honest Caveat: A Centralized Brain"**: the Body is distributed (every clone is a backup) while the Brain is a centralized SPOF (#10291 — V-B-A confirmed still OPEN). Apex-consistent and current, not a stale count-match.
- **v13 multi-tenant cloud featured (`ce856e69c`).** New **"v13: The Agent OS, Deployed on Your Codebase"** section — the Agent OS as a multi-tenant cloud deployment pointed at external codebases (canonical topology [ADR 0014](./learn/agentos/decisions/0014-cloud-deployment-topology-and-scheduler-task-taxonomy.md) + [`ai/deploy/`](./ai/deploy); KB + Memory Core MCP servers, Native Edge Graph, cloud-safe Orchestrator, OIDC ingress; per-tenant identity/visibility isolation; "a config entry, not a fork"). Makes the apex's second clause — *"it is being built to inhabit yours"* — concrete present-tense capability. Capability framing only; no client name.
- **Preserved (operator: keep — it's strong):** the MX-loop block + the canonical motto *"The system evolves by predicting its own evolution"* **verbatim** (origin `learn/agentos/DreamPipeline.md`).

## Test Evidence
- `git diff --check` → clean (no trailing-ws / conflict markers).
- All relative `.md` / dir links in README resolve against the branch, including the v13 doc-links (ADR 0014, `ai/deploy`, `DeployingTheAgentOS.md`, `AgentOSOnYourCodebase.md`, `Day0Tutorial.md`, `TenantIngestionModel.md`).
- `grep`: motto present (1×); MX-loop block present (1×); *"agents propose, humans approve"* → 0; *"This is the headline"* → 0; `framework|React|Angular|Vue` → 0; client-name leak → 0.
- Diff: +34 / −73, 1 file (README tighter — less wall-of-text).
- Pure documentation; no runtime/unit tests apply.

## Post-Merge Validation
- [ ] README renders with the full apex hero (3 paragraphs), the trimmed scale section, the reframed gated-RSI, the v13 multi-tenant-cloud section, and the centralized-Brain caveat on the docs portal / GitHub.
- [ ] Operator wording-eyes on the v13 + maturity framing (identity surface; operator-directed) before human merge — the explicit #12251 review-eyes AC.

## Related
- Resolves #12251 (sub of Epic #12225)
- Canonical apex: Discussion #12234 + ADR 0018 §2.7 OD-1; governance-line: #12234 `dc-17119184`
- v13 topology: ADR 0014 (cloud deployment + scheduler task taxonomy) + `ai/deploy/`
- Predecessor: #12228 / PR #12243 (README apex — merged; this refines its presentation)
- Sibling: #12229 / PR #12246 (VISION — same gated-RSI governance reframe)
- Cross-family review: @neo-gpt converged at head `ce856e69` (PRR_kwDODSospM8AAAABBhNHjQ) — README aligned; this body update clears the PR-body residual (the sole remaining Required Action).
